characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: It's implied Jenny Quackles wants nothing to do with him since she dumped coffee on his head in one episode when he called her "too cute". Ax-Crazy: He becomes this briefly in "Food Fight Club" laughing insanely and using a chainsaw made of grain. Dirty Old Man: His elderly self in the far future still is in love with Jenny's current self. Distracted by the Sexy: Inverted.SwaySwayis in love with Jenny Quackles who eats disgusting food and throws up. Drives Like Crazy: Has no regard for staying in a straight line when driving the Rocket Van, usually parking it by crashing it into things.

characters.name: SwaySway
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: It's implied Jenny Quackles wants nothing to do with him since she dumped coffee on his head in one episode when he called her "too cute". Ax-Crazy: He becomes this briefly in "Food Fight Club" laughing insanely and using a chainsaw made of grain. Dirty Old Man: His elderly self in the far future still is in love with Jenny's current self. Distracted by the Sexy: Inverted.SwaySwayis in love with Jenny Quackles who eats disgusting food and throws up. Drives Like Crazy: Has no regard for staying in a straight line when driving the Rocket Van, usually parking it by crashing it into things.

characters.name: Buhdeuce
characters.description: The Ace: In a sense. Many episode conflicts come fromSwaySwayfailing to qualify for something that Buhdeuce is anInstant Expertat. Ass Kicks You: Invoked with Buhdeuce's "Booty Kick". Acro Fatic: Buhdeuce is great at cartwheels, somersaults, ninja rolls, and flips, in spite of his extreme chubbiness. Big Eater: Buhdeuce keeps eating bread. Though this only the normal stuff he's eaten Gasshole: He is prone to farting."Once the seal is broken, the fart gates cannot be closed."

characters.name: Ketta
characters.description: Action Girl: She uses her mechanical skills to save the day. Masculine Girl, Feminine Boy: The rollerskating Masculine Girl to T-Midi's fancy Feminine Boy. Only Sane Man: Ketta often keepsSwaySwayand Buhdeuce grounded when they do something dumb. Rollerblade Good: Ketta almost always wears her roller skates. She wears them so often she has stinky feet. The Smart Guy: She is stated to be the smartest character in the show. She can build inventions within 10 seconds.

characters.name: T-Midi
characters.description: Abusive Parents: It implies he is or was abused by his mother in "Bros Night Out". Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He is mean and snooty towards others, especially the Breadwinners, considering their friendship effectively on-again off-again, but he's not without his nice moments and he does appreciate the Breadwinners and their bread. Mama's Boy: Absolutely adores his mother. Masculine Girl, Feminine Boy: The fancy Feminine Boy to Ketta's rollerskating Masculine Girl. Rich Bastard: He is the richest character in the show and he is rude towards others.

characters.name: Jenny Quackles
characters.description: All Girls Want Bad Boys: Jenny loves men who are cruel, such as a criminal biker, a scooter rider who is a show off jerk, and the Loafrechaun who torturedSwaySwayand Buhdeuce. In "Bad to the Duck Bone" she falls in love withSnakeSnake,SwaySway'sevil alter ego. Aw, Look! They Really Do Love Each Other: In "Quack to the Future" it's revealed Jenny threw up onSwaySwaybecause she actually likes him and the two go on a date. Expy: Seems to be one of Daisy Duck, being a white duck with a bow on her head. Hot Guy, Ugly Wife:SwaySwayis slender, has a cute face when he shows emotion, and dresses in cool clothes, while Jenny is very realistic looking, drools, vomits, and eats gross food. Loves My Alter Ego: A villainous example. Jenny beats upSwaySwaywhen he flirts with her but she loves his evil alter egoSnakeSnake.
